calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288
Petitioner CHRISTINE CHEUNG (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors DOMINIC CONNOR LACOUNTE and DANTE CHEUNG LACOUNTE. Petitioner were placed under oath and examined.

DAVID LACOUNTE (father) was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined. DAVID LACOUNTE(father) contested the changing of the minor children's names.

Proof of Publication is in the file.

The Court, after hearing testimony from both parents, DENIES petitioner's request to change the names of the minor children.
